snippet.title: Destiny - Symphonic version of Je Me Casse - Malta 🇲🇹 - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Destiny performs a symphonic version of her Eurovision 2021 entry Je Me Casse,  at Fort St. Elmo in Valletta with The Malta Philharmonic Orchestra. 

-
Credits:
Orchestration done by Mro. Kevin Abela.
Special thanks to: 
Visit Malta
Heritage Malta 
Besteam Audio
Arturo Pellegrini and Howard Keith Debono


-

snippet.title: The Weeknd & Ariana Grande - Save Your Tears (Remix) (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Official music video by The Weeknd & Ariana Grande performing "Save Your Tears" (Remix), available everywhere now: https://TheWeeknd.lnk.to/SYTRMX

►Subscribe to The Weeknd on YouTube: http://theweeknd.co/subscribeYD 
►Get exclusive merch: shop.theweeknd.com 
►Follow The Weeknd: 
https://twitter.com/theweeknd
https://www.facebook.com/theweeknd
https://www.instagram.com/theweeknd 
https://www.theweeknd.com 

Production Company: Blinkink @blink_ink
Director: Jack Brown - @jbanimation
Executive Producer: Josef Byrne @philipphlop 
Producers: Matt Marsh, Dom Thompson-Talbot & Sami Goddard
Storyboard Artist: Sav Akyüz @splitwigs

Design:
Pete Sharp @petesharp.universe
Dexter Maurer @dextermaurer
James Neilson @jamesxneilson

Character Design: Jack Brown - @jbanimation

Animation:
Anita Gill @_anitagill
Andrew Khosravani @andrew_khosravani
Ed Smith @boxbeatrobot
Katherine Spangenberg @katiediazz.art
Gaurav Wakankar @gwakankar
Maki Yoshikura @maki_animation
Michael Towers @michael.towers
Nikunj Patel @spiralofsorts
Thomas Knowler @knowlerdraws

Compositors:
Jonathan Gallagher @grasptheview
Paul Cheshire @paul_cheshire
Adriano Vessichelli @adrianovessichelli

Editor: David Toba @ediztor

Lyrics:
THE WEEKND
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I’m not with you
But then you saw me caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eyes
I don’t know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could’ve asked my why I broke your heart
You could’ve told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn’t there
And just pretended like you didn’t care
I don’t know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another…
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
ARIANA GRANDE
Met you once under a Pisces moon
I kept my distance ‘cause I know that you
Don’t like when I’m with nobody else
I couldn’t help it, I put you through hell
I don’t know why I run away, oh boy
I make you cry when I run away
Boy take me back ‘cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that it’s much too late
And you deserve someone better
THE WEEKND & ARIANA GRANDE
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
I don’t know why, I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day

#TheWeeknd #ArianaGrande #SaveYourTearsRemix

Music video by The Weeknd, Ariana Grande performing Save Your Tears (Remix / Main). © 2021 The Weeknd XO, Inc., marketed by Republic Records, a division of UMG Recordings, Inc.

snippet.title: "I'm absolutely DISGUSTED!" | Gary Neville's verdict on the European Super League proposals
snippet.description:
SUBSCRIBE ► http://bit.ly/SSFootballSub
PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS ► http://bit.ly/SkySportsPLHighlights2021
Gary Neville launched a scathing attack on the six clubs that have reportedly signed up to a breakaway European Super League and suggested they should be relegated from the Premier League for agreeing to the proposals. 

Sky Sports has contacted the clubs concerned for their responses.

snippet.title: Prince Harry and William Walk Together as Royal Family Departs Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
'Prince Harry and William Walk Together as Royal Family Departs Prince Philip's Funeral'

Prince William and his brother, Prince Harry, were seen walking together through the grounds of Windsor Castle following the funeral of their grandfather, Prince Philip, the Duke of Edinburgh, on Saturday.

snippet.title: The Truth About my Son
snippet.description:
Now that you've met my son, please consider sharing and donating to impact his life and so many others like him.
Livestream link (April 30th- MARK YOUR CALENDAR NOW!)- https://youtu.be/5J3peD8LZ5o
Learn more about the charity NEXT for Autism here- https://www.nextforautism.org/current-events/color-the-spectrum/

Join us in the live stream with a few folks you mighta heard of such as:
Andy Samberg, Adam Sandler, Casey Neistat, Chris Rock, Conan o'brien, Miranda Sings, iJustine, Jack Black, Jacksepticeye, John Oliver, Jon Stewart, Karl Jacobs, Marques Brownlee, Maya Rudolph, Mark Hamill, Merrell Twins, MrBeast, Paul Rudd, Rhett & Link, Sarah Silverman, Stephen Colbert, Terry Crews, Vsauce, Zach Galifianakis, Zach King plus a few more surprises!

snippet.title: Body Language Expert Stunned The Queen Did This At The Funeral
snippet.description:
Prince Philip's funeral, although tiny, was nevertheless full of pomp and pageantry befitting the passing of the longest-serving royal consort. There was lovely music performed by a choir (a chamber choir, in this instance); a piper playing The Last Post and chorus; and despite having been warned to stay away due to ever-present COVID danger, crowds still lined the streets, hoping for one last glimpse of their beloved Duke of Edinburgh, a man many considered to be the entire nation's grandpa.

In fact, in one last act of service he performed for his own family, Prince Philip's funeral brought so-called "strayed sheep" Prince Harry back home, if even for a flying visit, and it seems as if he may even have exchanged a few words with his estranged brother. (Grandpa would have been sure to approve.)

The one image that will stay with all of us, however, is that of his widow, the 94-year-old queen, sitting all alone in her pew, head bowed, looking surprisingly small and vulnerable and oh, so heartbreakingly alone despite being the ruler of a nation of over 68 million people, not to mention assorted realms and territories. Body language expert Jason Lee, a former professional poker player who now works as a relationship science and data analyst with Healthy Framework, noticed one moment during the funeral where the queen did something unexpected. He spoke with The List afterwards, giving his interpretation of what he saw and what he thinks it means.

Watch this video for what The Queen did at the funeral that stunned a body language expert! 

#TheQueen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

Read Full Article: https://www.thelist.com/385575/body-language-expert-was-surprised-queen-elizabeth-did-this-during-prince-philips-funeral/

snippet.title: Kate and Camilla arrive at Duke of Edinburgh's funeral
snippet.description:
The Duchess of Cambridge and the Duchess of Cornwall arrive for the funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh at Windsor Castle.

The Queen and her family gathered to say farewell to the Duke of Edinburgh, who died just over a week ago at Windsor.

Kate Middleton arrived at St George’s Chapel wearing a pearl necklace known as the Four-Row Japanese Pearl Choker.

The necklace was loaned to Kate by the Queen from the Royal Collection after it was given to Her Majesty by the Japanese Government.

Kate previously wore the statement necklace in 2017 at a dinner to commemorate the 70th wedding anniversary of Prince Philip and the Queen.

Read more here: https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/royal-family/prince-philip-funeral-kate-middleton-pearl-necklace-meaning-b1833126.html

snippet.title: In full: Windsor hosts Prince Philip's funeral as gun salutes fired and minute's silence held
snippet.description:
The Duke of Edinburgh's life and legacy were remembered during a funeral service reflecting his naval career, passion for engineering and dedication to the Queen.

During the poignant event attended by the Queen and his children and grandchildren, the duke was described as enriching the lives of all those he knew with his "kindness, humour and humanity".

In bright brilliant sunshine the funeral procession made its way through the precincts of the castle.

Prince Philip's children - Prince of Wales, Princess Royal, Duke of York and Earl of Wessex - walked behind his coffin carried by a Land Rover Defender hearse the Queen's consort helped design.

They were joined by the duke's grandsons the Duke of Sussex, Duke of Cambridge and Peter Phillips and Vice Admiral Tim Lawrence, the Princess Royal's husband, and the Queen's nephew the Earl of Snowdon.

The royals walked in step as a military band played and all stared straight ahead into the sun as they made their way to duke's final resting place.

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube ► https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

To read more about the funeral, click here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/royal-family/2021/04/17/prince-philip-funeral-live-news-queen-royal-family-latest-updates/

#princephilipfuneral #funeral #royals

Get the latest headlines: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/

Telegraph.co.uk and YouTube.com/TelegraphTV are websites of The Telegraph, the UK's best-selling quality daily newspaper providing news and analysis on UK and world events, business, sport, lifestyle and culture.

They were joined by the duke's grandsons the Duke of Sussex, Duke of Cambridge and Peter Phillips and Vice Admiral Tim Lawrence, the Princess Royal's husband, and the Queen's nephew the Earl of Snowdon.

The royals walked in step as a military band played and all stared straight ahead into the sun as they made their way to duke's final resting place.

en-GB.description:
The Duke of Edinburgh's life and legacy were remembered during a funeral service reflecting his naval career, passion for engineering and dedication to the Queen.

During the poignant event attended by the Queen and his children and grandchildren, the duke was described as enriching the lives of all those he knew with his "kindness, humour and humanity".

In bright brilliant sunshine the funeral procession made its way through the precincts of the castle.

Prince Philip's children - Prince of Wales, Princess Royal, Duke of York and Earl of Wessex - walked behind his coffin carried by a Land Rover Defender hearse the Queen's consort helped design.

They were joined by the duke's grandsons the Duke of Sussex, Duke of Cambridge and Peter Phillips and Vice Admiral Tim Lawrence, the Princess Royal's husband, and the Queen's nephew the Earl of Snowdon.

The royals walked in step as a military band played and all stared straight ahead into the sun as they made their way to duke's final resting place.

snippet.title: Prince Philip’s Funeral: Harry and William come together | 9 News Australia
snippet.description:
Prince William and Prince Harry have seemingly come together in a show of unity moments after leaving their grandfather, Prince Philip's funeral, at Windsor Castle. Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2noaGhv Get more breaking news at: https://bit.ly/2nobVgF

Royal commentator Ashley Pearson says she believes it was Kate, the Duchess of Cambridge, who first appeared to engage in conversation with Harry. 

3:30 Lady Penny Mountbatten has also reflected on the late Prince Philip and his fitting funeral service.

snippet.title: Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall Arrive For Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
Kate, the Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall were among the members of the Royal Family to arrive at Windsor Castle on Saturday ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

Because of coronavirus restrictions only 30 mourners will attend the funeral service, including Queen Elizabeth II, her four children and her eight grandchildren.

snippet.title: ‘The Queen has put her foot down’
snippet.description:
Royal Commentator Annabelle Sanderson says the Queen has “put her foot down” regarding the funeral of Prince Philip.

There are reports Prince William and Harry will be physically separated at the funeral.

“I think the Queen has put her foot down really hasn’t she, with regards to the uniforms – Prince Andrew wanted to go dressed as an Admiral,” Ms Sanderson told Sky News host James Morrow.

“Something I can only really describe as a costume because he’s not an Admiral.

“And now the two brothers won’t be walking next to each other; they’ll have their cousin in between them.

“I imagine the Queen put her foot down and said ‘no, this is about my husband, this is about the Duke of Edinburgh’.”

“Something I can only really describe as a costume because he’s not an Admiral.

“And now the two brothers won’t be walking next to each other; they’ll have their cousin in between them.

“I imagine the Queen put her foot down and said ‘no, this is about my husband, this is about the Duke of Edinburgh’.”

snippet.title: Prince Harry & Prince William Reunite At Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description: Prince William and Prince Harry reunited at their late grandfather, Prince Philip’s funeral. The royal brothers, who have reportedly been at odds for quite some time, walked in the funeral procession for Prince Philip, but they did not stand shoulder to shoulder as they walked from the state entrance of Windsor Castle to St. George's Chapel.

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

snippet.title: Queen Elizabeth Wipes Tear At Prince Philip’s Funeral
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth is bidding a somber farewell to her husband of 73 years. The monarch appeared to wipe away a tear while arriving for Prince Philip’s funeral on Saturday. Her majesty was accompanied by a lady in waiting as she rode behind the Duke of Edinburgh’s casket and entered St. George’s Chapel alone, dressed in all black and wearing a face mask. The Queen remained solo for the ceremony as well. Covid-19 restrictions prevented more than 30 people from attending the service in person and only people from the same household could sit together.

Stephen Howson, Jay Motty & Joe Smith are LIVE bringing you the news that Ed Woodward has resigned from Manchester United, The Glazers are ready to sell and The Super League looks to be over. Get involved in the comments! 

Stretford Paddock has content out EVERY DAY, make sure you’re subscribed for your Man United fix! - https://bit.ly/DEVILSsub 

📱 Follow us over on Twitter: https://twitter.com/StretfordPaddck
📷 And on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/stretfordpaddck/
🎙️ Listen to Our Podcast: https://podfollow.com/stretfordpaddock/
👕 Merchandise: https://stretfordpaddock.bigcartel.com

Go ahead and subscribe to get all of the latest Man United news, academy updates, transfer news, Manchester United fan reactions, podcasts, top 5’s on all things Man Utd,  live watchalongs of Premier League, Champions League and Europa League, Highlights, Review and Analysis. Stretford Paddock began in 2019, but in July 2020 merged with Full Time Devils - the original and best Man United YouTube fan channel - which is why you may see old videos from FTD on this channel, but it’s still the same place to get all the MUFC content you know and love, from Howson, McKola, Jay Motty, Joe, and the gang!

Information on Training and Matches for Stretford Paddock FC can be found here; https://www.stretfordpaddockfc.com.

#ManUnited #ManchesterUnited #MUFC

snippet.title: First Flight of the Ingenuity Mars Helicopter: Live from Mission Control
snippet.description: Up, up, and away! The Ingenuity #MarsHelicopter is set to make history. It will make the first attempt at powered flight on another planet on Monday, April 19. Don’t miss your chance to watch live with helicopter team in mission control beginning at 6:15 a.m. EDT (10:15 a.m. UTC) as they receive the data and find out if they were successful.

snippet.title: Customizing a JUMBO Nesting Doll Set
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I am going to be painting on and customizing a set of Russian nesting dolls (or matryoshka dolls). Ever since I painted on my firt set of dolls, you guys have been requesting that I do it again, so I was really excited to finally decorate these and add my own style to them. It's a different type of doll customization haha. This was a really fun art project to do, I highly recommend it if you are looking for creative activities to do. There is so much potential to do all kinds of different characters with these and create a completely original set. 

These are really awesome collectibles and make for such cool home decor. I could definitely see myself building a collection of them. They're also really fun to take apart and put back together lol

Here are the nesting dolls I have (affiliate links):

The one I painted last time: https://amzn.to/2A4LzXy​
The one I painted this time: https://amzn.to/375JM0E​
*make sure to tag me on instagram if you paint your own!!!

*LAST CHANCE for the Rubik's Cube pre-order. Don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

ME Custom Merchandise:
https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

ME Pin & Sticker Shop:
https://me-merch.myshopify.com

ME Printed Apparel and Accessories:
https://moriah-elizabeth.teespring.com/


____ME SOCIALS____

INSTAGRAM: 
https://www.instagram.com/moriahelizabethofficial/

TIKTOK:
https://www.tiktok.com/@me.moriah.elizabeth

FACEBOOK:
https://www.facebook.com/Moriah-Elizabeth-102592864903627

SNAPCHAT:
MoriahOfficial

VISIT ME WEBSITE:
https://www.moriahelizabeth.com/


____CONTACT ME____

EMAIL PICTURES OF YOUR ART (Create This Book or Fan art only please):
Artwork@Moriah.video

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:
moriah@nightmedia.co


_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. Currently have 15,000+ unread messages just in this folder. SORRY PEEPS!*

en.title: Customizing a JUMBO Nesting Doll Set
en.description:
Hey guys! Today I am going to be painting on and customizing a set of Russian nesting dolls (or matryoshka dolls). Ever since I painted on my firt set of dolls, you guys have been requesting that I do it again, so I was really excited to finally decorate these and add my own style to them. It's a different type of doll customization haha. This was a really fun art project to do, I highly recommend it if you are looking for creative activities to do. There is so much potential to do all kinds of different characters with these and create a completely original set. 

These are really awesome collectibles and make for such cool home decor. I could definitely see myself building a collection of them. They're also really fun to take apart and put back together lol

Here are the nesting dolls I have (affiliate links):

The one I painted last time: https://amzn.to/2A4LzXy​
The one I painted this time: https://amzn.to/375JM0E​
*make sure to tag me on instagram if you paint your own!!!

*LAST CHANCE for the Rubik's Cube pre-order. Don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs

snippet.title: $10,000 7-A-SIDE TOURNAMENT feat Chunkz, ChrisMD, Calfreezy, Manny & more! - EP1
snippet.description:
Spencer, Jaack, Sharky, Thogden, Ellis Platten and more join Hashtag OGs, current players and staff for an All-Star football tournament with a $10k prize pool on offer!  ► SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/hashtagutd ►Follow our guests on YouTube or here on Instagram:
Lloyd Griffith: https://www.instagram.com/lloydgriffith
David Vujanic: https://www.instagram.com/dvujanic

► FOLLOW us on TWITCH! - http://twitch.tv/HashtagUnited
► MERCH! http://hashtagutd.com/ 
Hashtag United are a one-of-a-kind football and esports club, based in Essex, England.  Formed in 2016 by Spencer Owen as a group of mates playing exhibition games, we now play in the 9th tier of English football, the Essex Senior League. We won our league in our first season in non-league football and were looking good for a second promotion when the 2019/20 season was voided.  We merged with AFC Basildon Women in summer 2020 and formed our women's team, Hashtag United FC Women, who play in the 4th tier of women's football.  We also now have 40+ youth teams, reserve and development teams...and not forgetting our esports team of Tom and Shawrey, who play at the world's highest level.  Subscribe on YouTube for our latest football content (and watch our journey so far), or on Twitch for gaming, football and talk content!

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency’s website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch Jim’s video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go check out Perog's version here too- 
https://youtu.be/J4mkZU2Y0as

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

snippet.title: LAST TO LEAVE ISLAND KEEPS IT!! (UNSPEAKABLES Island)
snippet.description:
🔥SHOP NOW!!🔥━► https://www.teamrar.com/ 

Carter Sharer, @Unspeakable Lizzy Capri, Ryan Prunty, Stove's Kitchen, Deniesse and James Amendola just did an ultimate HIDE & SEEK CHALLENGE (https://youtu.be/IkSmuvfBllk)!! But today we're doing a LAST TO LEAVE ISLAND KEEPS IT challenge!! You asked for it, and we delivered!! That's right, the last person to leave Unspekables island gets to keep it!! Matt Braeden recorded all the action on his iPhone 12 as Carer, Usnpeakble, James Amendola, Lizzy Capri, Stove's Kitchen, Deniesse and Ryan Prunty prepared with hot dogs, potato chips, bottled water, pirate costumes, jet skis, motor boats and lots of patience!! Carder and Unspakable decided to have a race: boat versus jet ski. It's the boat race GONE WRONG. We're lucky no one was hurt!! What do you think the winner should do with the island?? Comment below!!

Thanks to James Amendola (https://www.instagram.com/jamesamendola/)!!

snippet.title: Prince Harry, William and Charles Walk Behind Prince Philip's Coffin at Funeral Procession
snippet.description:
Members of the U.K. Royal Family accompanied the coffin of Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh in a funeral procession towards St George's Chapel in Windsor, U.K.

Prince Philip, who died on 9 April at the age of 99, will be laid to rest in the Royal Vault at Windsor Castle after a funeral service steeped in military and royal tradition - but also pared down and infused with his own personality.

Because of coronavirus restrictions only 30 mourners will attend the funeral service, including Queen Elizabeth II, her four children and her eight grandchildren.

snippet.title: Prince William & Prince Harry Will Not Walk Together At Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Prince William will not walk side by side during any part of Prince Philip's funeral. Buckingham Palace announced that Princess Anne's son Peter Phillips will walk between the two brothers as the procession follows a Land Rover carrying the Duke of Edinburgh’s remains from the state entrance of Windsor Castle to St. George’s Chapel on April 17.

snippet.title: Denmark official faints during Covid-19 conference
snippet.description:
The head of the Danish Medicines Agency, Tanja Erichsen, fainted during a press conference on live TV over the country’s decision to stop using the AstraZeneca vaccine.

The agency later announced that she was taken to the hospital as a precaution and has since recovered.
#Denmark #AstraZeneca #Vaccine

Subscribe to our channel for all our latest in-depth, on the ground reporting from around the world.

snippet.title: rebirthing : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“I’ve had a lot of lives – like my cat, I’m on my ninth life.” 
Demi Lovato’s explosive documentary series comes to a close with revelations about her broken engagement, her return to the studio, and exploration of moderation sobriety as she attempts to let go of her past and moves ahead living her truth. 

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Love is more than just the way you feel. Text loveis to 22522 for support and help understanding healthy relationships.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Text: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

 
Find resources for your path to recovery at the Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

es-419.title: renacimiento : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"He tenido muchas vidas. Como mi gato, estoy en mi última vida".
La explosiva serie documental de Demi Lovato llega a su fin con revelaciones sobre su compromiso cancelado, su regreso al estudio y la exploración de la sobriedad moderada mientras intenta dejar atrás su pasado y avanzar viviendo su verdad.

Recursos:

Línea de ayuda de la Asociación Nacional de Trastornos Alimentarios (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (también ofrecen chat en línea)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Línea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

El amor es respeto. El amor es algo más que lo que se siente. Envía loveis al 22522 para obtener apoyo y ayuda para entender las relaciones saludables.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Texto: loveis al 22522
Chat en línea: www.loveisrespect.org

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: Envía el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: Envía el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
Canadá: Envía el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

Aprende a salvar vidas en endoverdose.net.

Encuentra recursos para tu camino hacia la recuperación en el Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

ko.title: 환생 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:
"저는 제 고양이처럼 목숨이 아홉 개예요. 아홉 번째 인생을 살고 있죠"
데미 로바토의 파혼, 녹음실 복귀 이야기와 음주와 약물의 적정량 사용을 통해 과거를 놓고 진실한 삶을 살려는 시도를 공개하며 폭발적인 다큐멘터리 시리즈는 막을 내린다.

도움받을 곳:

전국 섭식 장애 협회 (NEDA) 헬프라인
1-800-931-2237 (채팅/메시징 서비스 제공)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

정신건강 및 약물 남용 장애를 앓고 있는 개인 및 가족을 위한 SAMHSA 핫라인
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 

사랑은 존중입니다. 사랑은 감정 그 이상입니다. 22522로 loveis를 보내시면 도움과 함께 건강한 관계에 관해 배울 수 있습니다.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
문자: 22522로 loveis를 보내세요
온라인 상담: www.loveisrespect.org

즉각적인 도움이 필요할 경우, 지역 위기 문자를 이용하세요.
미국: 741741로 문자 HOME 보내기
영국: 85258로 문자 SHOUT 보내기
캐나다: 686868 또는 741741로 문자 CONNECT 보내기

endoverdose.net에서 생명을 구할 수 있는 방법을 알아보세요.

Recovery Resource Hub에서 회복 과정을 위한 자원을 확인하세요.
(https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/)

de.title: Wiedergeburt : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
"Ich hatte viele Leben, wie meine Katze. Das ist mein neuntes."
Demi Lovatos explosive Dokuserie endet mit Enthüllungen über ihre gelöste Verlobung, ihre Rückkehr ins Studio und das Konzept des maßvollen Konsums, während sie versucht, ihre Vergangenheit ruhen zu lassen und ihre Wahrheit zu leben.

Hilfsangebote:

Telefonische Anlaufstelle der National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (auch Click-to-Chat-Nachrichten)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Telefonische Anlaufstelle von SAMHSA für Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen und/oder Suchtstörungen und deren Angehörige
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Liebe ist Respekt. Liebe ist mehr als das Gefühl. SMS mit loveis an 22522 zur Unterstützung von gesunden Beziehungen.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
SMS: loveis to 22522
Online-Chat: www.loveisrespect.org

Wenn Sie sofortige Hilfe benötigen, nehmen Sie Angebote zum Krisenbeistand per SMS wahr:
USA: SMS mit HOME an 741741
Vereinigtes Königreich: SMS mit SHOUT an 85258
Kanada: SMS mit CONNECT an 686868 oder 741741

Lernen Sie, Leben zu retten, auf endoverdose.net.

Finden Sie Hilfsangebote für Ihren Weg in die Genesung bei Recovery Resource Hub
(https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

fr.title: Renaissance : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
"J'ai plusieurs vies, comme un chat. J'en suis à ma neuvième."

Le documentaire explosif de Demi Lovato touche à sa fin avec des révélations sur ses fiançailles rompues, son retour en studio et l'expérimentation d'une thérapie de la modération tandis qu'elle tente de tourner la page sur son passé et de vivre sa vérité. 

Ressources :
 
Plateforme d'écoute de la National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (chat en ligne disponible) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
Service SAMHSA pour les individus et proches qui font face à des troubles de la santé mentale et/ou prise de substances
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
L'amour est du respect. L'amour va plus loin que les sentiments. Envoyez "loveis" au 22522 pour soutenir et comprendre ce qu'est une relation saine.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
SMS : loveis au 22522
Chat en ligne : www.loveisrespect.org
 
En cas de besoin immédiat, contactez par SMS votre centre local :
États-Unis : HOME au 741741
Royaume-Uni : SHOUT au 85258
Canada : CONNECT au 686868 ou 741741
 
Apprenez à sauver des vies sur endoverdose.net.
 
Pour vous aider dans votre processus de guérison, rendez-vous sur Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

id.title: Kelahiran Kembali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Aku mempunyai banyak nyawa – seperti kucingku, aku dalam nyawa kesembilanku sekarang.”
Serial dokumenter eksplosif dari Demi Lovato hamper sampai kepada titik akhir dengan pengungkapan tentang pertunangannya yang kandas, kembalinya ke studio, dan eksplorasi dari kewarasan moderasi ketika dia mencoba untuk melepaskan masa lalunya dan melangkah maju menjalani hidup dengan penuh keceriaan.

Sumber:

Saluran bantuan National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (mereka juga menawarkan perpesanan klik-untuk-obrolan) www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Cinta Adalah Respek. Cinta itu lebih besar dari sekadar caramu merasakan. Ketik loveis kirim ke 22522 untuk dukungan dan bantuan memahami hubungan yang sehat.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Ketik: loveis kirim ke 22522
Obrolan Daring: www.loveisrespect.org

Atau jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

Pelajari bagaimana cara menyelamatkan jiwa di endoverdose.net.

Temukan sumber-sumber sebagai jalanmu untuk pemulihan di Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

pt-BR.title: renascimento : Dancing with the Devil
pt-BR.description:
“Eu já tive várias vidas – como meu gato, estou na minha última.”
A explosiva série documental de Demi Lovato termina com revelações sobre o noivado rompido, sua volta ao estúdio e sua exploração da sobriedade moderada enquanto ela tenta se livrar do passado e encontrar sua verdade.

Recursos:

Telefone de atendimento da National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (também existe a chance de bate-papo online) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
Atendimento de SAMHSA para indivíduos e familiares que enfrentam distúrbios ligados à saúde mental e/ou por uso de substâncias.
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Amor é muito mais do que um sentimento. Envie loveis para 22522 para ter apoio e aprender a compreender relacionamentos saudáveis.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Envie: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Caso necessite de auxílio imediato, entre em contato com suas opções locais de atendimento:
Estados Unidos: Envie HOME para 741741
Reino Unido: Envie SHOUT para 85258
Canadá: Envie CONNECT para 686868 ou 741741
 
Aprenda a salvar vidas em endoverdose.net.

Encontre recursos para seu caminho para a recuperação em Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

snippet.title: New Mercedes EQS REVIEW & tested 0-60mph - is it as quick as a Tesla?
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

This is the all-new Mercedes EQS!

It’s Mercedes’ answer to the Tesla Model S and Porsche Taycan, and we think it might be one of the best-looking EVs we’ll see all year! 

For starters, it more than looks the part… But then again, would you expect anything else from what's effectively an all-electric S-Class? What’s more, the performance stats are more than good enough. Powered by dual-electric motors, the EQS can deliver 523hp & 835Nm of torque! Not only that, but with an 108kWh battery pack hidden under the surface, it can also apparently provide you with 478 miles of range.

Ok so it may be a bit down compared to the Model S Plaid+, but let's face it, most electric cars will be! However, we think there’s one area where the EQS has the Tesla beat… The interior! Not only will you find high-quality materials throughout the cabin, up-front the dashboard is dominated by the Mercedes Hyperscreen, with a HUGE 18-inch touchscreen down the middle which is flanked by two 12-inch displays! 

Surely the Hyperscreen is enough to convert you to an EV fanboy, right?! There's only one way to find out... Join Mat for this all-new review!

.............................................................

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“I crossed a line I’d never crossed in addiction.” 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger


Pre-order Demi Lovato’s new album ‘Dancing With The Devil… The Art Of Starting Over’ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

es-419.title: perdiendo el control : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"Crucé una línea que nunca había cruzado en la adicción".

En la primera parte de esta valiente serie documental, Demi Lovato, su familia y amigos revelan por primera vez lo que la llevó a una sobredosis casi mortal.

Recursos:

Línea de ayuda de la Asociación Nacional de Trastornos Alimentarios (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (también ofrecen chat en línea)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Línea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: Envía el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: Envía el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
Canadá: Envía el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

id.title: Kehilangan Kendali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Aku melewati batas yang tak pernah aku lewati karena kecanduan.”

Di bagian I dari serial dokumenter yang tak kenal takut ini, Demi Lovato, bersama keluarga dan teman-temannya, terus terang terbuka untuk pertama kali tentang apa yang menuntunnya pada overdosis yang nyaris mematikan.

Sumber:

Saluran bantuan National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (mereka juga menawarkan perpesanan klik-untuk-obrolan)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

ko.title: 통제를 잃다 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:
"중독에 있어서 절대 넘지 않았던 선을 넘었어요"

대담한 다큐멘터리 시리즈 1편에서, 데미 로바토와 가족, 친구들은 데미가 목숨을 잃을 뻔한 약물 과다 복용에 이르기까지의 상황에 관해 처음으로 솔직하게 털어놓는다.

도움받을 곳:

전국 섭식 장애 협회 (NEDA) 헬프라인
1-800-931-2237 (채팅/메시징 서비스 제공)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

정신건강 및 약물 남용 장애를 앓고 있는 개인 및 가족을 위한 SAMHSA 핫라인
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
즉각적인 도움이 필요할 경우, 지역 위기 문자를 이용하세요.
미국: 741741로 문자 HOME 보내기
영국: 85258로 문자 SHOUT 보내기
캐나다: 686868 또는 741741로 문자 CONNECT 보내기

fr.title: La perte de contrôle : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
“J'ai dépassé les limites de ma dépendance.” 

Dans la première partie de cette courageuse série documentaire, Demi Lovato, sa famille et ses amis évoquent en toute franchise pour la première fois ce qui l'a conduite à son overdose quasi fatale.

Ressources :
 
Plateforme d'écoute de la National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (chat en ligne disponible) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
Service SAMHSA pour les individus et proches qui font face à des troubles de la santé mentale et/ou prise de substances
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
En cas de besoin immédiat, contactez par SMS votre centre local :
États-Unis : HOME au 741741
Royaume-Uni : SHOUT au 85258
Canada : CONNECT au 686868 ou 741741

de.title: Kontrollverlust : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
“Ich überschritt in der Sucht eine Grenze wie nie zuvor.“

Im ersten Teil dieser furchtlosen Dokuserie erzählen Demi Lovato und ihre Familie und Freunde zum ersten Mal unverblümt, was zu ihrer beinahe tödlichen Überdosis führte.

Hilfsangebote:

Telefonische Anlaufstelle der National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (auch Click-to-Chat-Nachrichten)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Telefonische Anlaufstelle von SAMHSA für Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen und/oder Suchtstörungen und deren Angehörige
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Wenn Sie sofortige Hilfe benötigen, nehmen Sie Angebote zum Krisenbeistand per SMS wahr:
USA: SMS mit HOME an 741741
Vereinigtes Königreich: SMS mit SHOUT an 85258
Kanada: SMS mit CONNECT an 686868 oder 741741

pt-BR.title: perdendo o controle : Dancing with the Devil
pt-BR.description:
“Ultrapassei um limite que nunca tinha cruzado no vício.”

Na primeira parte dessa destemida série documental, Demi Lovato, sua família e amigos falam com franqueza, pela primeira vez, sobre o que levou à overdose quase fatal.

Recursos:

Telefone de atendimento da National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (também existe a chance de bate-papo online)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Atendimento de SAMHSA para indivíduos e familiares que enfrentam distúrbios ligados à saúde mental e/ou por uso de substâncias.
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Caso necessite de auxílio imediato, entre em contato com suas opções locais de atendimento:
Estados Unidos: Envie HOME para 741741
Reino Unido: Envie SHOUT para 85258
Canadá: Envie CONNECT para 686868 ou 741741

snippet.title: Kourtney & Addison Bunker Down: "KUWTK" Katch-Up (S20, Ep4) | E!
snippet.description:
Kim & Khloe Kardashian go into survival mode while the rest of the family questions Kourt's close relationship with TikTok star Addison Rae. Watch!

#KUWTK #KeepingUpWithTheKardashians #EEntertainment #KimKardashian #KhloéKardashian #KourtneyKardashian #KylieJenner #KendallJenner #KrisJenner #AddisonRae

SUBSCRIBE: http://www.youtube.com/kuwtk

snippet.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
snippet.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

*The Rubik's Cube pre-order is still ON! But it ends soon, don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

SUPPLIES I USED (contains affiliate links):
Angelus Leather Paint (big bottles): https://amzn.to/2QzjUmG​
Angelus Leather Paint (small bottles): https://amzn.to/2U5gmuo​
Vinyl Red Tape: https://amzn.to/2WHjhLR​
High Gloss Acrylic Finisher: https://amzn.to/2J4mCwc


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

ME Custom Merchandise:
https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

ME Pin & Sticker Shop:
https://me-merch.myshopify.com

ME Printed Apparel and Accessories:
https://moriah-elizabeth.teespring.com/


____ME SOCIALS____

INSTAGRAM: 
https://www.instagram.com/moriahelizabethofficial/

TIKTOK:
https://www.tiktok.com/@me.moriah.elizabeth

FACEBOOK:
https://www.facebook.com/Moriah-Elizabeth-102592864903627

SNAPCHAT:
MoriahOfficial

VISIT ME WEBSITE:
https://www.moriahelizabeth.com/


____CONTACT ME____

EMAIL PICTURES OF YOUR ART (Create This Book or Fan art only please):
Artwork@Moriah.video

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:
moriah@nightmedia.co


_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. Currently have 15,000+ unread messages just in this folder. SORRY PEEPS!*

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL).

en.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
en.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

snippet.description:
Harmony and Bel contemplate their futures while Claire faces an unexpected challenger in her campaign. Leyla meets a new friend at the Appeal.

Chicken Girls fanny packs & necklaces available now! www.chickengirls.com

ABOUT CHICKEN GIRLS
With Rhyme and her friends all grown up, Harmony has found her own squad of Chicken Girls. But with all their new interests, secrets and crushes, can this girl group survive middle school? Created by Janey Feingold.

ABOUT BRAT TV 
Brat TV makes original shows with all of your favorite creators! Tune in every day at 3pm for full episodes of “Chicken Girls,” “Total Eclipse,” “Crown Lake,” “Zoe Valentine” and more.

snippet.title: "This is not a civil war, it’s a nuclear war" - Premier League board member on European Super League
snippet.description:
► Subscribe to Sky Sports News: http://bit.ly/SkySportsNewsSub

There are several board members at the six breakaway clubs who are opposed to joining the new league but they feel they do not have the power to stop it.

The owners of the clubs involved were fully expecting a backlash to the super league plans but were 'not worried' about bad PR. “Our primary job is to maximise our revenues and profits. The wider good of the game is a secondary concern.”

It's also been suggested that the club owners would be 'secretly delighted' at the prospect of players not being able to play in international fixtures and if the clubs were to remain in the Premier League then the clubs would focus on midweek Super League games as a priority.

#SkySportsNews #SkySports #EuropeanSuperLeague

snippet.title: Manchester United stand down from the ECA as Ed Woodward steps down from UEFA roles
snippet.description:
► Subscribe to Sky Sports News: http://bit.ly/SkySportsNewsSub

Manchester United have stood down from the European Club Association (ECA) and club executive vice-chairman Ed Woodward has stepped down from his UEFA roles.

Sky in Italy have confirmed Juventus, AC Milan and Inter Milan have also left the ECA. Juventus chairman Andrea Agnelli has also resigned as ECA chairman, a position he held since 2012, and left his post as a member of the UEFA Executive Committee to take up the Super League vice-president role.

The ECA is a body representing the interests of over 200 professional football clubs in UEFA. It is the sole such body recognised by UEFA, and has member clubs in each UEFA member association.

#SkySportsNews #SkySports #EuropeanSuperLeague

ABOUT CHICKEN GIRLS
With Rhyme and her friends all grown up, Harmony has found her own squad of Chicken Girls. But with all their new interests, secrets and crushes, can this girl group survive middle school? Created by Janey Feingold.

ABOUT BRAT TV 
Brat TV makes original shows with all of your favorite creators! Tune in every day at 3pm for full episodes of “Chicken Girls,” “Total Eclipse,” “Crown Lake,” “Zoe Valentine” and more.

snippet.title: Dollar Store Makeover
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I am trying a bit of a new concept for my channel. I decided to go shopping at the Dollar Store for a couple of items that I thought would be fun to paint on, customize and decorate to make them more of my style. I noticed shopping at the Dollar Tree, that there were so many cute things that had a lot of easy DIY potential. I wanted to do this to show that you don't need to spend a lot to have fun with art and customizing things. There are so many cheap and affordable items to be painted on! This video starts out with a mini dollar tree haul, and then I go on to feature 3 different $1 makeovers. I hope I give you some fun ideas for easy dollar store flips!

Let me know if you want me to try this again or if you want me to try the "EXTREME MODE" (lol) dollar store makeover where I choose my art supplies from the dollar store as well.


PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

____CONTACT ME____

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:

_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages.
